docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEALTHRIGHT 360 DBA  WALDEN HOUSE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DARLEEN JACKSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, HEALTHRIGHT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DENIS WILLIAM, VP OF THE COMPANY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, DARLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEALTHRIGHT 360 DBA  WALDEN HOUSE $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,000.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT THREW OUT PERSONAL ITEMS WHILE SHE WAS IN THE HOSPITAL RATHER THAN RETURNING THEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM HEARING SET FOR OCT-04-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, DARLENE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) JUDGMENT FILED ON 7/5/2018 PAID BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, DARLENE
DECLARATION OF DARLENE JACKSON RE: ADDING THIRD PARTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, DARLENE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGMENT CREDITOR DARLENE JACKSON IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HEALTHRIGHT 360 IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DENISE WILLIAMS. DENISE WILLIAMS (THIRD PARTY SUBPOENAED FOR EXAMINATION HEARING)IS PRESENT, WITH SPECIALLY APPEARING COUNSEL LAURIE E. YOON OF LOW, BALL & LYNCH LAW FIRM, REPRESENTING BOTH JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND DENISE WILLIAMS FOR PROCEEDING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND DENISE WILLIAMS RETAIN RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
